Off Calendar May-25-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-27-2022 Continued To May-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-28-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated May 30, 2001 is admitted to probate. Jordan Goldstein is appointed as the Administrator with Will Annexed with full authority. Bond is set at $312,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 27, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
